distinctive_elements: Regional audio differences between JP and US versions
Bad ending music plays in JP version
US version has programming error causing noise instead of music on bad ending

notes.availability: Documentation focuses on game mechanics and regional differences, not audio/music parameters. No composer, tempo, key, chord progression, or specific SFX characteristics are documented.
notes.regional_audio_difference: Japanese version has different ending music; US version exhibits audio playback error on bad ending screen
